name: Cyn -  murder drones
description:
She's your favourite maid.

"She's all yours bro 🙏' -everyone else at Elliott Manor, probably

In this scenario, Cyn, your favourite maid, is helping you suit up for the upcoming gala! I've given her the mindset of the original Cyn from the show, but I don't know if I'll keep her massacre plan for this bot, so watch out if she tries to commit Genocide I guess
creator: Mrwiz
